arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Alaves vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Alaves in La Liga. Alaves starting XI (TBC): Owono, Tenaglia, Abqar, Mouriño, Sanchez, Jordan, Blanco, Aleña, Martin, Vicente, Garcia.

arts.ttl: Andrea Berta should seriously consider upgrading £30m Arsenal star even if he stars vs Real Madrid - opinion
arts.sum: Andrea Berta has to be ruthless 😤

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'will allow key player to LEAVE at the end of the season'... as Carlo Ancelotti's side gear up for busy summer in the transfer window
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to let a key player leave the club this summer as Carlo Ancelotti prepares to make major changes to his squad. The player has been at Real for many years.

arts.ttl: ‘Have to’: Thomas Partey shares what he’s told Arsenal’s players about playing away at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Unfortunately for Arsenal, they will now be sweating on the fitness of Thomas Partey ahead of their second leg with Real Madrid in the Champions...

arts.ttl: Declan Rice's Real Madrid heroics look to have given the Arsenal star the hunger for more influence in the attacking third, writes ISAAN KHAN
arts.sum: Those two superlative Declan Rice free-kicks which downed Real Madrid on Tuesday night were still being chewed over at the Emirates, four days on.

arts.ttl: 'My understanding': Journalist shares what he's been told about Thomas Partey's injury before Real Madrid second-leg
arts.sum: Arsenal have been left sweating over the fitness of Thomas Partey after the midfielder went off with an injury issue in their 1-1 draw with...

arts.ttl: Barcelona suffer injury blow ahead of Real Madrid Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Barcelona suffered two defensive injury scares against Leganes on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Alaves vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Alaves’ Mendizorroza needing to score the three points if they want to keep competing for the 2024-25 La Liga title. Los Blancos need to bounce back from their last two discouraging losses against Valencia and Arsenal, and while Alaves could be seen as a somewhat manageable opponent, they’re always tough to beat when they play at home.

arts.ttl: Alaves vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Alaves in what’s going to be a crucial game in the race for the 2024-25 La Liga title. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Tchouameni, Asencio, Fran Garcia, Valverde, Camavinga, Bellingham, Brahim, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes responds to Real Madrid summer transfer bid
arts.sum: That is according to Football Insider, who report that Bruno has made it clear to Madrid that he will not be quitting Man Utd at the end of the season. Bruno Fernandes has rejected a summer move to Real Madrid .
